problem: What substrate allows silicon-level performance in fully flexible electronics?
hypothesis: Liquid crystal elastomer actuation may resolve What substrate allows silicon-level performance in fully flexible electronics? by activating at the molecular level.

experiment.protocol: Synthesis and characterization with 23 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
